findings.title: Remove ~30 unused dependencies (radix-ui, recharts, etc.)
findings.what: Remove all @radix-ui/* packages (0 are imported), plus embla-carousel-react, react-day-picker, react-hook-form, react-resizable-panels, recharts, sonner, vaul, cmdk, input-otp, next-themes. Run npm prune after.
findings.why: 30+ unused packages inflate node_modules and bundle size. Zero @radix-ui imports exist anywhere in components/ or src/. This is leftover from initial shadcn/ui scaffolding that was replaced by the WinXP redesign.

findings.title: Add error.tsx and not-found.tsx
findings.what: Create a WinXP-themed error boundary (error.tsx) and 404 page (not-found.tsx) in src/app/. Style them to match the desktop aesthetic (e.g., BSOD or Windows error dialog).
findings.why: Currently any runtime error shows a white screen and unknown routes fall through with no custom handling. These are standard Next.js conventions that protect UX.

findings.title: Add Open Graph and Twitter card metadata
findings.what: Add openGraph (title, description, url, images) and twitter (card, creator) fields to the existing metadata export. Add export const viewport with width/initialScale.
findings.why: Social sharing (LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Discord) currently shows no preview image or rich card. High impact for a portfolio site where links are shared frequently.

findings.title: Add generateMetadata and generateStaticParams to project detail pages
findings.what: Convert the project detail page to a server component (or add a parallel server layout) that exports generateMetadata for per-project SEO titles/descriptions, and generateStaticParams to pre-render all project slugs at build time.
findings.why: Currently /projects/[slug] pages are client-only so crawlers see no project-specific metadata. Each project page should have unique title and description for search engines.

findings.title: Compress 10MB headshot image
findings.what: Compress PLA-Headshot.jpg from 9.6MB to <300KB WebP or use next/image with automatic optimization. NOTE: branch heartbeat/2026-04-03-optimize-10mb-hero-headshot-image already exists — check if it was completed and merge, or finish the work.
findings.why: A 10MB image in public/ will be served uncompressed to any visitor whose browser requests it, even if it's only used as a background. Massive page weight penalty.

findings.title: Add favicon and web app manifest
findings.what: Add a favicon (currently missing — browser 404s on /favicon.ico) and a basic manifest.json with name, icons, theme_color matching the dark aesthetic.
findings.why: Missing favicon causes console errors and looks unprofessional in browser tabs. Manifest enables basic PWA installability and proper mobile home screen behavior.

findings.title: Extract hardcoded project slugs in HomeWindow
findings.what: Replace the hardcoded ["chronicle", "crooked-finger", "elucidate-chess"] array in HomeWindow.tsx with a derived list from the projects data source, e.g. projects.slice(0, 3).map(p => p.slug).
findings.why: Adding or reordering projects in projects.ts won't automatically update the home window featured list, creating a maintenance trap and potential stale references.
